pieces.label: City skyline (shaded ░▒▓ density gradient)
pieces.note: Single fenced ASCII cityscape in response to 'show me a city'. Uses light-to-dark block shading (░ ▒ ▓) to build skyline silhouettes against a textured sky/ground; central tall structure with shorter buildings flanking. The source transcript is truncated mid-piece, so the final row ('░░░░░▒▒▓▓') is incomplete and there is no closing code fence — capture from the first ░ row through the last available line.

missed_or_ambiguous: Thread contains exactly one assistant message (MSG 2) with one piece of art. The transcript is truncated mid-piece: MSG 2 ends abruptly at an incomplete row '░░░░░▒▒▓▓' with no closing ``` fence, so the full extent of the cityscape is unknown — extraction should take everything from the opening fence's first art row to end-of-message. Range mode chosen (not full) to exclude the opening ``` fence line from the extracted bytes.
